normal.$description: Nav label opacity fade, down-arrow rotation, generic ease

bounce.$description: Bouncy overshoot — nav pill expand, nav label width

navLabel.$description: Nav label fade-in delay after pill expands

tabTransition.$description: BottomNav .nav-tab composite transition — from inline <style> tag

labelTransition.$description: BottomNav .nav-label composite transition — from inline <style> tag

scale.$description: Active press transform on nav tabs
